phrases.text: On the one hand… on the other hand…
phrases.example: On the one hand it saves time, on the other hand it may reduce quality.
I partly agree, but the long-term effects worry me.
A key point is how it affects fairness.
That said, there are clear benefits.
It’s not that simple because outcomes vary.

phrases.text: In my view, the best approach is…
phrases.example: In my view, the best approach is a balanced policy.
So my conclusion is that we need guardrails.
